<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Strategy\ContainerCommands\Functions; use Predis\Command\Strategy\SubcommandStrategyInterface; class RestoreStrategy implements SubcommandStrategyInterface { /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function processArguments(array $arguments): array { $processedArguments = [$arguments[0], $arguments[1]]; if (array_key_exists(2, $arguments) && null !== $arguments[2]) { $processedArguments[] = strtoupper($arguments[2]); } return $processedArguments; } }
